summary: Manages the persistence, state, and UI for all application settings. Other features register their settings with this one.

listensFor.summary: Registers a new setting definition with the feature.
Changes the current value of a setting and persists it to disk.
Requests that the application's settings folder be opened in the native file explorer.

publishes.summary: [INTERNAL] Action dispatched by the feature to itself to trigger loading from disk.
[INTERNAL] Action dispatched after settings have been successfully loaded from disk.

payload_schema.description: A map of setting keys to their string-encoded values.

publishes.summary: [PUBLIC] Broadcasts that a specific setting's value has been changed by the user or another system.
